# output.posterior_at { #tspaint.output.posterior_at }

```python
tspaint.output.posterior_at(tracks, sample, position)
```

Posterior vector for ``sample`` at a genomic ``position``.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**tracks**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tspaint.output.Segment`)\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-sample segment tracks (e.g. from :func:`posterior_table`).

<code>[**sample**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Sample-node id to look up.

<code>[**position**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Genomic position.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`) or None]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The ``(K,)`` posterior on the segment covering ``position``, or ``None`` if no segment covers it.
